prompt:
Goal: Create an ultra-realistic luxury French Riviera fashion magazine cover for LUMIÈRE, featuring a glamorous blonde woman in couture on a sunlit terrace overlooking Cannes.

Canvas: Vertical magazine cover, 2:3 aspect ratio, full-bleed editorial photography, high-end couture aesthetic, warm golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field.

Main subject: One tall elegant woman standing confidently at a stone balustrade on the Côte d’Azur. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur centered over the facial features. She has very long straight honey-blonde hair swept over one shoulder, bare shoulders, sparkling chandelier earrings, a diamond bracelet, and a poised luxury-model posture. Her left hand rests on the stone railing; her right hand holds a structured ivory handbag with small gold hardware. She wears an ivory structured off-shoulder gown with sculptural folded ruffles, wrapped bodice, ruched waist, high front slit, and dramatic floor-length train. Include elegant pointed heels partially visible beneath the gown.

Setting: A grand Mediterranean terrace with pale limestone balustrades in the foreground, a blurred sea and marina in the distance, hazy blue mountains on the horizon, palm greenery below, and an ornate cream-colored Belle Époque building along the right edge. The atmosphere should feel like Cannes or Monaco, expensive, sun-washed, timeless, and cinematic.

Layout and typography: Use a luxury fashion magazine cover layout. Place the huge masthead across the very top in refined gold serif capitals, slightly textured metallic foil effect. Put a small subtitle near the masthead on the upper right reading CÔTE D’AZUR. Keep the woman centered-right, with the masthead partly behind or near her hair as in a real cover.

Visible text content: Include exactly 4 discrete cover-line groups besides the masthead and subtitle: 1) upper-left headline: L’ART DU CHIC / ÉLÉGANCE, AUDACE / & INTEMPOREL; 2) mid-left headline: BEAUTÉ À / LA FRANÇAISE / LE RITUEL ÉCLAT / PARFAIT; 3) bottom-left small label: "ÉDITION SPÉCIALE"; 4) bottom-left main location/date: "CANNES / MAI 2025". Use white or charcoal elegant serif text, aligned left, with generous spacing.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic luxury editorial photography, couture magazine cover, creamy ivory and champagne palette, soft blue sea background, refined French typography, premium print finish, natural skin tones, realistic fabric folds, crisp subject with softly blurred background.

Constraints: Do not add extra text, barcodes, watermarks, logos, or additional people. Keep exactly one handbag, one bracelet, one pair of earrings, one gown, and 4 cover-line groups. Preserve the face-obscuring blur if anonymity is desired.
